zh.ELY, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 費馬納格恩尼申吉倫埃利

zh-hans.ELY, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 費馬納格恩尼申吉倫埃利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thady O Carroll于1100年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 費馬納格恩尼申吉倫埃利。他和Mrs O Carroll至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Carroll
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill ‘descendant (or son) of Cearbhall’, a personal name perhaps based on cearbh ‘hacking’ and hence originally a byname for a butcher or a fierce warrior.
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

variants.name: Carrell
meanings: English: variant of Quarrell, either a topographic or occupational name for someone who lived by or worked at a quarry (Middle English quarrel), synonymous with Quarry , or a nickname from Middle English, Old French quarel, quarrel, carrel, denoting a short, heavy, square-headed bolt for a cross-bow, arbalest, or siege engine; this use might have had an occupational connotation, for someone who made or used quarrels, or it may have been used figuratively for a thickset or stout person. In Devon and Hampshire the name Quarrell survived as Carol and Car(r)oll. In Yorkshire and Durham from the late 18th century onward the name became indistinguishable from Carroll and its variants, borne by Irish migrants.

English (of Norman origin): perhaps also a Norman French habitational name from Carelles in Mayenne (France), early recorded as Quarrel. Compare Carrel . No medieval bearers have been found in England to confirm this origin.
Irish: altered form of   Carroll  .

variants.name: Carvell
meanings: English: metonymic occupational name from Middle English carvel, kervel ‘small ship’, used to denote a sailor.
Irish: variant of   Carroll  .

variants.name: Carwell
meanings: Irish: variant of   Carroll  .

variants.name: Caroll
meanings: Irish (Galway): variant of   Carroll  .

variants.name: Carrol
meanings: Irish (Cavan and Cork): variant of   Carroll  .
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

variants.name: Carlin
meanings: Irish (North Ulster; now also common in Scotland): from Ó Cearbhalláin ‘descendant of Cearbhallán’, a diminutive of the personal name Cearbhall (see Carroll ).
English: variant of   Carling  .
Italian (Veneto): from a pet form of the personal name Carlo, Italian form of Charles .

variants.name: Carol
meanings: Irish: variant of   Carroll  .
Americanized form of Polish, Rusyn, and Slovak Karol or Karoľ, and Hungarian Károly (see Karoly ).

variants.name: Carolan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Connolly, Malachy.
Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cearbhalláin, a northern and midland Irish name meaning ‘descendant of Cearbhallán’, a diminutive of the personal name Cearbhall (see Carroll ).

Anglicized form of Ó Cairealláin ‘descendant of Caireallán’, a diminutive of the personal name Caireall. In the 12th and 13th centuries this family were chieftains of Clondermot in Derry. Carleton was later adopted as an English equivalent.

variants.name: Carville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Collette.

French; English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the places in Calvados and Seine-Maritime named Carville, from the Scandinavian personal name Kári + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill, see Carroll .

nameMeanings.name: Thady
meanings: Same as Tadhg.

nameMeanings.name: O
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: Thady O Carroll was born in 1100, in Ely, Enniskillen, County Fermanagh, Ireland. He had at least 1 daughter with Mrs O Carroll.

fr.lifeSummary: Thady O Carroll est né en 1100, à Ely, Enniskillen, County Fermànagh, Irlande. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Mrs O Carroll.

de.lifeSummary: Thady O Carroll wurde 1100 in Ely, Enniskillen, County Fermanagh, Irland geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs O Carroll mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Thady O Carroll è nato il nel 1100 nel Ely, Enniskillen, County Fermanagh, Irlanda. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Mrs O Carroll.

ja.ELY, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ フエルマナグエニスキレンエリー
ja.lifeSummary: Thady O Carrollは1100年にアイルランドコウントイ フエルマナグエニスキレンエリーで生まれた。彼はMrs O Carrollとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Thady O Carroll(은)는 1100년 아일랜드 카운티 퍼먼아그h 니스킬렌 엘리에서 태어났다. 그는 Mrs O Carroll(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thady O Carroll nasceu em 1100, em Ely, Enniskillen, County Fermanagh, Irlanda. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Mrs O Carroll.

ru.lifeSummary: Thady O Carroll родился в 1100 г. в местности эли, эннискиллен, коунти фирманаг, Ирландия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Mrs O Carroll.

es.lifeSummary: Thady O Carroll nació en 1100, en Ely, Enniskillen, County Fermanagh, Irlanda. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Mrs O Carroll.
